'''Caldrahlsen Mechanicals''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing company<ref name="GFT" /> specializing in [[Class three droid/Legends|class three droid]]s<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref> based on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]].<ref name="CFT-D" />

The company produced [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="FOP" /> and was the first to design and market droids specifically for the legal profession. Initially, these droids were met with a degree of skepticism but soon became commonplace within the Empire's legal system.<ref name="CFT-D" /> Their most notable product was the [[C4LR litigation droid]].<ref name="GFT" /> Caldrahlsen's main offices and manufacturing plants were located on Esseles.<ref name="CFT-D" />
